label: negative

market_cap.note: BONK FDV ~$555M >> $60M filter. Detector exits with Info event after market_cap check.

swaps_1h.note: Approximate 1h slice of typical $30M–$50M daily BONK DEX volume

baseline_7d.note: Robust 7-day baseline. 1h slice of $2.2M vs daily baseline $33.4M is normal turnover (~6.6% of daily in 1h).

price_data.note: Small negative price movement — within normal noise. Well below 30% threshold.

expected_output.note: evaluate() returns Ok(vec![Info event]) and exits. No A/B/C evaluation.

notes: Primary negative regression: high-volume legitimate token with robust rolling baseline.
Market-cap filter (Bolz et al. 2024, $60M) correctly excludes BONK before any spike logic runs.
If market_cap_filter were hypothetically disabled: volume_ratio = 2200000 / 33429000 * 24 ≈ 1.58× (well below 5× threshold). Price change = -1.7% (well below 30%). Neither A nor B would fire.
is_established_protocol = true (jup_strict=true). Demonstrates that Signal C would be suppressed if it somehow applied.
